feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Determine Partner from one Bill To party to Multiple Sold To parties
entry.content:
Hi Experts, 

Settlement Management- Condition Contracts.

We have a scenario where we have one Bill- To assigned to Multiple Sold-To Parties. During settlement in Condition contracts, from Bill To party the correct Sold to Party has to be determined from business volume and price of that sold to has to be determined in the Settlement Document from condition records to settle to the customer.

i'm talking of multi-Payee 0S02 condition contract for rebate and i'm maintaining condition records with Sold to Parties in the condition contract, the sold to parties are maintained in Business volume criteria. System is creating Settlement documents with same bill to party but all the settlement documents considering only one condition record of one sold to party instead of considering condition record of each sold to party maintained in the condition records of CCM. (Scenario- One bill party assigned to Multiple Sold To Parties)

Can you please suggest ways to determine each sold to party from the same bill to party so that condition records of each sold to party is determined.

Settlement Management SAP S/4HANA SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sales

entry.title: Clear Open PMR from "Stage for Production" app
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We have few component quantity which are no longer required to be consumed against an order but in "Stage for Production" app these components are still showing as these needs to be staged because the PMR is exisitng. Can we get rid of these PMR"s which are no longer required to stage

example: For an order "O1", we need 100 EA of component "A". But we have completed the order by just staging and consuming 98 EA"s of "A". Now the order O1 is finally confirmed but in stage for produciton app, we still see 2 EA needs to be staged which is creating a confusion to the operators. 

Can we clear the record for 2 EA from "Stage for Production" app ?

I know that it will be cleared if we change the quantity of component "A" in "O1" to 98 but this is not so feasible as we need to change for each order and we do TECO at the end of the month. We use cross- order staging. 

 

Thanks

Vamsi Krishna

entry.title: Performance Issues when loading and exporting data from a custom table via SE16N
entry.content:
We are unable to load and export the same amount of data from a custom table in SE16N as we are in the non-upgraded environments. The system will time out with an ABAP runtime error. Further details are in the attachment.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Quick way of finding successor / released objects in S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Quick steps to finding out the released / successor Objects in S/4 HANA 

1. Using SAP's Cloudification Repository Viewer github link

https://sap.github.io/abap-atc-cr-cv-s4hc/?version=objectReleaseInfo_PCE2023_1.json&q=mara

refer detailed blog by- @aoyang 

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/s-4-hana-cloudification-guide-for-developer-navigating-to-released-apis/ba-p/13950875

2. Alternate way to finding successor object is using backend table view ARS_W_API_SCCSSR : API Successor Data of Deprecated/Decommissioned APIs where SubObjectName is the search Object. User should have access to backend S/4 HANA system. This table stores only deprecated api's also refer other supporting table ARS_W_API_STATE for release state info.

entry.title: Period distribution not defined for fiscal year variant Z1 Message No. ACC_AA080in AS01
entry.content: When I try to create an asset in AS01 I get the error, Period distribution not defined for fiscal year variant Z1 Message No. ACC_AA080, does anyone have an idea how to resolve this?

entry.title: Status update in S4 HANA not happening during Engineering order execution in SAP ME
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created an Engineering order in SAP S4 HANA and released to SAP ME, During the Engineering order execution in SAP ME, I have started the operation, consumed few components (Assembling) and completed few operations.

even after completing the operations, I couldn't see any yield conf./component consumption messages in MII queue which resulted in status not getting updated in S4 system. for normal Prod. orders, it's working fine. but this issue is with Engineering order type.

could it be issue with any of the configuration in workflow or from ME settings?

can you please help me in here.

Thank You!

entry.title: AATP Product Allocation table in Fiscal Period instead of Calendar Month
entry.content:
Hi Gurus 

I hope you can help me with an answer or point me to a source where I might find it ...

When it comes to time dimension, all our Supply Planning (including Demand Planning) is done in Fiscal Periods which don't match the calendar month.

Currently the set up of the Product Allocation table uses calendar month. It would be more convenient to use Fiscal month. That would match the data in IBP (we use SAP IBP for Demand Planning and Supply Planning), easier for the demand planner and easier for the integration IBP (via CI-DS) to S4. Is that possible, to use a different time unit? Does it has to be necessarily calendar month?

Thanks in advance

Best regards

Roberto

entry.title: HANA ODBC Test Connection Error
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

I'm currently trying to establish an ODBC connection to a SAP HANA Cloud database, I need this to connect the data to a Microsoft PowerBI report. However, no matter what I try, the following message appears everytime I try to test the connection:

"Communication Link Failure:-10709 connection failed (RTE:[89006] system call 'connect' failed, rc=10061, No connection could be made because the target machine actively refused it)."

Please consider the following:

  • My computer can successfully ping the SAP Hana server I'm trying to connect to, via cmd.
  • The credentials needed to test the ODBC connection are disregarded, it makes no difference if I use the correct credentials or purposefully wrong ones, the connection will show the same error.

#UPDATE 1:

The original issue was resolved, using telnet instead of ping I managed to identify that the original server I was trying to connect to, wasn't answering correctly. Now using a secondary server which succesfully responds to the telnet command. However, a new issue has shown up, the following error message appears whenever I try to test the connection:

Any help or advice is greatly appreciated.

Thanks,

Daniel.

entry.title: SAP EWM and Loftware Integration – Documentation and Setup Guidance
entry.content:
Hi Community,

I’m currently working on integrating SAP EWM with Loftware for label printing, and I’m looking for any guidance or documentation related to this integration.

Your suggestions or references would be highly appreciated.

Thanks in advance!
Seshu

entry.title: SAP Dealer Business Management Road map to ECC to S4 Hana migration
entry.content:
Hi All,

I just want to know what the steps or guidelines involved are while migrating the system from ECC to S4HANA for SAP SD & DBM (dealer business management). If anyone has any notes for SAP DBM (Dealer Business Management), please share them to my email ID: pavanm5353@gmail.com

 

Regards,

Pavan Kumar M

entry.title: Guidance Required on Deletion or Retention of Component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 During Upgrade
entry.content:
During planning an upgrade project for SAP system you have identified that the component DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is installed in your landscape. As part of the upgrade, you want to confirm whether this component can be safely deleted or should be retained.

  1. Whether DMIS_CNT 2011_1_731 is still required for the upgraded system?

  2. If it is obsolete or deprecated, what is the recommended procedure for safely removing it?

  3. If it must be retained, are there any prerequisites or compatibility notes we should be aware of?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Send an email with a screenshot of my Service Quotation
entry.content:
Good afternoon

Please your help.

I want to send an email in SAP S4 HANA Cloud Public Edition with the button that is the right corner of my Service Quotation.

But I want to send a screenshot of the app instead of the link of the page.

Is there a way to send an automatic screenshot of the app by email?

Thanks in advanced!

entry.title: Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 704
entry.content:
Hello experts,

I am using BAPI_GOODSMVT_CREATE for movement type 704. I am getting 'Goods movement not possible with mvmt type 704' error. when I am doing 704 movement type in MI10 transaction is working fine.Is it the case that movement types 703 and 704 cannot use MIGO?Please help me to solve the issue.Thanks in advance.

■Error picture

GOODSMVT_CODE：05

 

■Configuration

Best regards,

Peipei

entry.title: Delivery Note (DN) PGI'ed and need to alter HU info
entry.content: hi, i've PGI a DN however, now i received new info on the HU. will there be any way to redo the HU; i don't have access to VL09.

entry.title: Reversal of Posted Depreciation for a specific period
entry.content:
We want to reverse the posted depreciation for a specific period and we want to stop posting depreciation against that asset in the forthcoming periods. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Miss Material Group Fields in Service Consumer: CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out in CDP integ.
entry.content:
Dear experts,

 

We are currently using the service consumer CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out to integrate with SAP CDP. During the integration process, we encountered an issue where the Material Group fields (MVGR1, MVGR2, MVGR3, MVGR4, MVGR5) are not present in the WSDL definition of this service.

 

These fields are crucial for our integration scenario and are already available in another standard service consumer, SalesOrderBulkReplication_Out. We require similar access to the material group fields in the CustomerReturnBulkReplication_Out service.

 

Could you please advise how we can enhance or configure the service to include these fields? Alternatively, is there a recommended approach or extension method to make these fields available?

 

We appreciate your guidance on resolving this issue.

 

Best regards,

entry.title: How to assign SAP user (not BTP email) in Approval Step in SAP Build Process Automation?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I’m building a workflow in SAP Build Process Automation, and I need to assign an SAP backend user to the Approval Request step.

I don’t want to assign the task using a BTP user email — I want to use the SAP user (e.g., from S/4HANA) instead.

Is it possible to assign approval tasks based on SAP usernames or user IDs?
If so:

  • How should the user be referenced in the process?

  • Do I need to configure anything in Identity Authentication or Cloud Connector to make this work?

Any help or clarification would be greatly appreciated.
Thanks in advance!

entry.title: How to Exclude Reservation from MD04
entry.content:
Hello,

I’m trying to find a way to exclude specific reservations from appearing in MD04.

The use case is based on a condition in the reservation (when RESB-XWAOK is initial). In such cases, we want to prevent the reservation from being considered in MRP and ideally have it not show up in MD04 at all.

While researching possible enhancements, I came across the BAdI MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA.

My question is: Is it possible to use MD_CHANGE_MRP_DATA to exclude reservation entries from MD04? If so, what’s the recommended approach? If not, is there another BAdI or enhancement point that would be more suitable for this requirement?

Any suggestions or guidance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: S4 - Migration - Fiori App
entry.content:
Hello All - 

for planning the migration of custom code from ECC to S4 , ( Fiori Migration app need to be always run on S4 as backend system? 

or if we have run the readiness check in the ECC using ATC (ABAP TEST COCKPIT) , can the zip file be uploaded directly ? 

 

thanks 

aakash
